disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: US puts up $750K to evacuate an American who was aboard hantavirus cruise ship from remote island - WVIR
updates.body_en: US puts up $750K to evacuate an American who was aboard hantavirus cruise ship from remote island WVIR
updates.summary_zh: 美国拨款75万美元从偏远岛屿撤离一名汉坦病毒邮轮上的美国人。
